programme.title: Amanpour and Company
programme.desc: Christiane Amanpour leads discussions about world issues and interviews with global leaders.

programme.title: One on One With Steve Adubato
programme.desc: Professionals and innovators share their experiences.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots With Henry Louis Gates, Jr.
programme.desc: Actor Michael Douglas and writer/director Lena Dunham explore their family roots.

programme.title: The American Revolution
programme.desc: The French-American alliance changes the war and moves it to other theaters; navies battle off England and in the Caribbean, while armies advance in Indian Country and the South; the British take Charleston.

programme.title: The American Revolution
programme.desc: British General Cornwallis struggles to pacify the southern states; supported by the French, a victory at Yorktown secures independence for the Americans.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.sub-title: Meek for a Week; Arthur, World's Greatest Gleeper
programme.desc: Muffy challenges Francine to be nice for one week; Arthur joins a gang.

programme.desc: Olive and Otto try to stop zeroes from disappearing; odd things happen to the Bears basketball team.

programme.desc: Martin encounters a lost colony of black-footed ferrets.

programme.desc: Corky is selected to make a presentation at school during a science day celebration, but humidity jeopardizes her project.

programme.desc: Lyla figures out how to do a magic trick with clues from Miss Emmaline; Luke finds a puppy.

programme.desc: Arugula and Carl go on an adventure as archaeologists; Carl spots a UFO on Mother's Day.

programme.sub-title: Daniel Likes to Be With Dad; Daniel Likes to Be With Mom

programme.title: Phoebe & Jay
programme.desc: Jay and Lupe use wayfinding signs to track down Phoebe; Pete and Craig face an epic hoops battle on the courts.

programme.desc: Rudy feels angry when Abby asks him to share his toys, so his friends make a movie to show that sharing can be fun.

programme.desc: All aboard the Moo Moo Choo Choo; visiting great uncle Duper in the Windborhood; world's biggest whirligig blows away; helping great uncle Duper imagine how to build a new one.

programme.title: Let's Learn
programme.sub-title: Can You Hear the "er" in Water?
programme.desc: Learning about water; counting 10-20; reading "Wrinkles"; decoding r-controlled vowels er, ir and ur.

programme.desc: Ari grows impatient waiting for ketchup; Elinor, Olive and Ari have to figure out how to expand their clubhouse to fit all the new members of The Explorer's Club.
